title: Command Blocker
description: Adds a simple gamerule to quickly disable all command blocks
body:
# Command Blocker
Adds a simple new gamerule, `commandBlocksEnabled`, to the game to toggle whether command blocks are enabled while the game is running.

## Why does this exist?
It exists for a few reasons, firstly, because this is just not possible in singleplayer. Ever placed down a repeating command block with `/tp @a 0 90 0` or something similar? This is for then.

In multiplayer, in the `server.properties`, there is a setting called `enable-command-block` - so you would think this mod is useless. **It is not**. Modifications to your `server.properties` are only applied on *server start*, so you cannot change this setting *while the server is running*. HOWEVER, this can be a security problem on servers, so please only install this mod if you trust all your operators/admins.
